summary: NAS100 in strong bullish extension at 30744.6 after sustained rally from May 19 low (28663). D1 structure firmly HH/HL with 5 consecutive bullish candles, but price at 193.7% of old dealing range indicates EXTREME extension. H4 range also breached (104.5%). No Kill Zone active. Bullish trend intact but chasing at these levels is dangerous. Recommend WAIT for pullback to 30400-30500 support zone or fresh session for entry.

ict_analysis.daily_bias: D1: BULLISH HH/HL structure confirmed. 5 consecutive bullish candles from 30069 to 30744. Old dealing range (28596-29705) is STALE — price at 193.7% indicates new impulse leg underway. Price broke above ATH 30379 with continuation. No bearish MSS on D1. Macro trend strongly bullish above all MAs. Extreme extension warns of pullback risk.
ict_analysis.h4_context: H4: Dealing range 30390.7-30729.2. Price at 104.5% — slightly above range. Large bullish FVG at 30400-30486.7 remains unmitigated as support. Recent H4 candles show consolidation near highs with mixed bullish/bearish closes. Key support at 30538 (today's low area). Equilibrium at 30560 being tested.
ict_analysis.m15_status: M15: Recent range 30643.7-30752.8. Bullish OB detected at 30658.2-30676.6 with 22.1pt displacement. Price near range top at 30744.6. NO Kill Zones active (11:03 UTC — between NY close and London open). No valid entry possible outside Kill Zone per ICT rules.

recommendation: WAIT — Price in extreme extension (193.7% D1, 104.5% H4) with no active Kill Zone. High-impact news at 16:15 UTC (ADP) and 18:00 UTC (ISM Services). Wait for: (a) NY Kill Zone (13:00-16:00 UTC) for potential pullback entry into 30400-30500 support, or (b) London Open tomorrow. Bias remains Bullish but entry timing is poor.
